title: NUTRIUPS Soup Bowls with Handles, 900ml Microwave Soup Bowl with Lid, Soup Mug with Handles, Bowl for Ramen, Noodle, Porridge (Seasalt Blue)
features: Large Capacity: This bowl has a capacity of 900 ml, making it perfect for people with big appetites to enjoy soup or large cups of coffee.
Ventilated Lid: When heating, cover the cup with the lid and open the vent to prevent overflow and splashing. Note:The lid can only be heated in the microwave for 2-3 minutes.

Microwave Bowl: Made of high-quality ceramic material, fired at high temperatures, it can be used for microwave heating. The handle does not get too hot during the microwave heating process, making it easy to handle.
Sturdy Inner Wall: The inner wall is sturdy and thick, providing good insulation. When the lid is covered, it can maintain insulation for a longer period of time.
Easy to Clean: Both hand washable and dishwasher safe.The smooth interior and glazed design make it easy to clean.
Main Usage: Ideal for Chinese instant noodles, chili, soup, covering leftovers, casseroles! It can also be a great choice for gifting.
description: Product Description Share Table Time with Your Family! Ceramic breakfast cup with a lid for sealing, keeps hot food warm and soup from spilling, making even a single-person breakfast full of ritual. Previous page One gray and one white design, suitable for couples to drink coffee in the afternoon tea！ Ceramic cups take care of your baking rituals and daily deliciousness~ The lid can be sealed, and can be used to keep food fresh or store leftovers！ No spillage when carried from the kitchen to the desk, start the whole day.
